title: The Zambia Institute of Marketing (Amendment) Act, 2023

sections.heading: 26th December, 2023
sections.text: ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. Enactment

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Zambia Institute of Marketing Short title
sections.text:
(Amendment) Act, 2023, and shall be read as one with the Zambia Act No. 2 of
Institute of Marketing Act, 2022, in this Act referred to as the 2022
principal Act.

sections.heading: Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
sections.text:
of the definition of “marketing” and the substitution therefor of the of section 2
following:
“marketing”means a societal process by which individuals
and groups obtain what they need and want through
creating, offering and freely exchanging products and
services of value with others and includes advertising, sales
management, personal selling, marketing communications,
publicity, sales promotions, exhibitions, branding, packaging,
merchandising, distribution, warehousing, wholesaling,
franchising, retailing, social marketing, digital marketing,
international marketing, marketing research, marketing
consultancy, business development, customer service,
customer care and service marketing;.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K4.00 each.
276
